name: ai-mobile
description: A finite, capacity-aware Codex orchestrator for local Codex CLI, Claude Code, Antigravity, and optional Cursor workers on Windows.

interface.shortDescription: Use local AI CLIs as one efficient Codex project team.
interface.longDescription: AI Mobile installs one shared MCP runtime into Codex and Claude Code, keeps current Codex active on the highest-value critical path, and coordinates authenticated local Codex CLI, Claude Code, Antigravity CLI, and optional Cursor capacity across one project or a finite portfolio. Exact privately trusted Fable 5 and Sonnet 5 workers may edit clean bounded primary paths with deterministic verification and no redundant model review. Machine-wide resource guards prevent oversubscription. Normal startup creates no desktop UI, manager loop, Goal, heartbeat, automation, or repeated poll.
capabilities: Trusted Fable 5 and Sonnet 5 primary writers
Shared Codex and Claude Code installation
Passive startup with explicit UI fallback
One-shot Codex restart and exact-thread resume
Exact OpenAI.Codex package restart with model-bound resume
defaultPrompt: Use AI Mobile to finish this project outcome efficiently while current Codex stays on the critical path
Use AI Mobile for this nontrivial project task and require end-to-end evidence before completion
Use AI Mobile to coordinate these separate projects as one finite evidence-gated portfolio
Show the passive AI Mobile resource inventory
